subject: A stout goblin-like figure in a detective's coat and wide-brimmed hat crouches in a swirling magical environment, examining a glowing orb
description: A heavyset humanoid figure — stout, broad-nosed, with greenish-grey skin — crouches at the center of the image, wearing a dark green longcoat and a wide-brimmed fedora-style hat. A triangular badge or emblem is pinned to their coat. One hand is raised with a pointing or grasping gesture; the other rests near their belt, where a sidearm is holstered. In front of the figure, a small glowing orb pulses with yellow-green light, suggesting magical containment. The background is dominated by swirling teal tentacle-like forms and organic curves, evoking an otherworldly or biologically dangerous environment.
foreground: Stout goblinoid figure crouching, glowing orb on ground before them
background: Swirling teal and dark-green organic shapes suggesting a strange biome or magical contamination zone
emotion: Focused concentration, the figure's posture is cautious and alert
